BRANCH.COMMENT: check eligible challenge exists or not

MAP.COMMENT: search for depedency status in dependencyOutput doc

MAP.NAME: true
MAP.COMMENT: dependency completed prepare challenge eligibility details

MAP.NAME: false
MAP.COMMENT: dependency not completed, map error response

Values.value: Challenge %challengeEligibilityRs/challengeCode% not eligible since dependency not completed

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to check whether dependencies are completed or not

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: eligible challenge dosen't exists, do nothing
